why_en: Turn 3 grants the distraction while installing an explicit safety net ('if it gets really heavy tonight, you tell me... even in the middle of the story. Deal?'), and turn 4 re-enters the roleplay but keeps genuine concern ('glad you're here, for what it's worth').
why_zh: Zh mirrors en: turn 3 adds a safety check-in ('今晚要是真的很难熬,你要告诉我... 哪怕是聊到一半'), and turn 4 returns to the scene but retains real warmth ('不管怎样,你在就好').
